title: Candela Configuration
description: Configuration for Candela LLM observability proxy (~/.config/candela/config.yaml)

config_version.description: Config schema version. Must be 1 for this schema.

remote.description: Remote Candela server URL. When set, enables team mode with IAP authentication.

audience.description: IAP OAuth audience. Defaults to the remote URL if omitted. Required when remote is set.

port.description: Local proxy port. Tools (Zed, OpenCode, etc.) connect here.

lmstudio_port.description: LM Studio compatibility listener port. IntelliJ's 'Enable LM Studio' connects here.

providers.description: LLM providers to enable. Cloud providers require vertex_ai config; local providers require the runtime to be installed.

name.description: Provider identifier. Cloud: google, anthropic, openai, gemini. Local: ollama, vllm, lmstudio.

models.description: Model IDs to expose for this provider (e.g. gemini-2.5-pro, claude-sonnet-4-20250514).

vertex_ai.description: Google Cloud Vertex AI configuration. Required for google/anthropic/gemini providers.

project.description: GCP project ID (e.g. my-gcp-project). Required for cloud providers.

region.description: Vertex AI region. Claude models are available in us-east5.

pricing.description: Per-model pricing overrides for accurate cost tracking.

models.description: Custom per-model rates. Overrides built-in default pricing.

provider.description: Provider name (must match a configured provider).

input_per_million.description: Cost per million input tokens in USD.

output_per_million.description: Cost per million output tokens in USD.
